Package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http

package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.http
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    HttpClientConfig
    Configuration for MagicUtils HTTP client.
    HttpClientConfig.DefaultSettings
    Default request settings applied to each request.
    HttpClientConfig.LoggingSettings
    Request/response logging configuration.
    HttpClientConfig.RetrySettings
    Retry and backoff configuration values.
    HttpClientConfig.Timeouts
    Timeouts used for HTTP connection and request handling.
    MagicHttpClient
    MagicUtils HTTP client with retries, config defaults, and JSON mapping.
    MagicHttpClient.Builder
    Builder for MagicHttpClient.
    MagicHttpClientProfile<C>
    High-level runtime profile for named MagicHttpClient instances.
    MagicHttpClientProfile.Builder<C>
    Builder for MagicHttpClientProfile.
    MagicWebSocketClient
    MagicUtils WebSocket client with config defaults and logging.
    MagicWebSocketClient.Builder
    Builder for MagicWebSocketClient.
    MagicWebSocketClientProfile<C>
    High-level runtime profile for named MagicWebSocketClient instances.
    MagicWebSocketClientProfile.Builder<C>
    Builder for MagicWebSocketClientProfile.
    MultipartBody
    Simple multipart/form-data builder.
    MultipartBody.Builder
    Builder for multipart/form-data content.
    RetryPolicy
    Retry policy for HTTP requests with exponential backoff.
